--- return_group_by.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
RETURN a, b
GROUP BY a

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 15,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 22,
                  NameEnd: 23,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
              },
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 25,
                  NameEnd: 26,
                  Name:    "b",
                },
              },
            },
            GroupBy: &ast.GroupBy{
              Group: 27,
              Exprs: []ast.Expr{
                &ast.Ident{
                  NamePos: 36,
                  NameEnd: 37,
                  Name:    "a",
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph RETURN a, b GROUP BY a
